name: acc
_version_note: Baseline 0.1.0 == Cargo.toml at first public release. The plugin version is loosely coupled to the engine version: it bumps independently, and may diverge from the engine, only when the plugin's hook/MCP surface (manifest, hook mappings, skills) changes on its own.
description: scored-memory loop — two verbs (acc_retrieve + acc_act) + lifecycle hooks
